content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(6, 7, 0), (6, 9, 0), (5, 7, 1), (7, 8, 2), (2, 4, 3), (4, 6, 6), (1, 7, 10), (3, 9, 11), (5, 6, 14), (4, 9, 15), (2, 7, 18)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 14.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (6, 7, 0) has node 6 and time 0. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (6, 9, 0) has node 6 and time 0. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 7, 1) has node 5 and time 1. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (7, 8, 2) has node 7 and time 2. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 4, 3) has node 2 and time 3. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 6, 6) has node 4 and time 6. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 7, 10) has node 1 and time 10. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 9, 11) has node 3 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 6, 14) has node 5 and time 14. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (4, 9, 15) has node 4 and time 15. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 7, 18) has node 2 and time 18. -> Add node 7.

Now we have collected all nodes that are linked with node 5 at time 14 or later:
[6, 7, 9, 8, 4, 7, 10, 11, 14, 9, 2, 7, 18]

The final answer is:
[6, 7, 9, 8, 4, 7, 10, 11, 14, 9, 2, 7, 18]

Answer: [6, 7, 9, 8, 4, 7, 10, 11, 14, 9, 2, 7, 18]
